name: Ningbo BaoSi Energy Equipment Co., Ltd.
summary: Ningbo BaoSi Energy Equipment Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of screw compressors and machine components in China and internationally. The company's products include screw compressor host machines; screw machines for coal bed methane, natural gas, oil and associated gas; whole machines; compressor accessories; and vacuum pumps, as well as other products. Its products are used in various fields of petrochemical, mining and metallurgy, and electricity. The company is based in Fenghua, China. Ningbo BaoSi Energy Equipment Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Yinuo Baosi Group Ltd.
